docs.title: Anthropic Marketplace Strategy: The Reliability & Context Engineering Layer
docs.summary: ThumbGate is the **Enterprise Control Plane** for Claude-based agentic workflows. We solve the "Vibe Coding" security crisis by providing a verifiable, context-engineered runtime. 1. **Context Engineering Moat:** Move beyond raw prompts. Use our Semantic Context Packs to give Claude high-density proprietary knowledge. 2. **Zero-Trust Agentic Guardrails:** Mitigate supply-chain risks (Pentagon-grade concerns) by enforcing machine-readable prevention rules auto-generated from human feedback.

docs.title: Autonomous GitOps
docs.summary: This repo uses PR-gated autonomous automation. No direct merge-to-main shortcuts. - `.github/workflows/ci.yml` - Runs `npm test`, `npm run prove:adapters`, `npm run prove:automation`

docs.title: ContextFS (Constructor/Loader/Evaluator)
docs.summary: This project implements a file-system-native context layer inspired by current context-engineering research. Root: - `contextfs/raw_history/`

docs.title: Intent Router
docs.summary: The intent router adds an orchestration layer above individual tools. It converts free-form work goals into policy-aware plans: 1. Select a named intent.

docs.title: Packaging and Sales Plan
docs.summary: - Local RLHF feedback capture - Schema validation - Prevention rules

docs.title: PaperBanana Diagrams
docs.summary: - Monthly cap enforced by `scripts/budget-guard.js`. - Default cap: `$10/month` (`RLHF_MONTHLY_BUDGET_USD=10`). - Diagram generation script blocks projected overspend before calls and logs spend only after successful generation.

docs.title: One-Line Pitch
docs.summary: The enterprise-grade **Reliability Gateway** that turns user feedback into verifiable context and stops AI agents from repeating mistakes. The Gateway is the operational layer between raw LLM output and production reliability. We provide **Context Packs** that move beyond simple prompts to high-density semantic environments. - **Primary Goal:** Transform "Vibe Coding" into "Workflow Hardening" through **Pre-Action Gates**.

docs.title: Platform Research (As Of March 3, 2026)
docs.summary: This research was done on March 3, 2026 using official documentation or official product pages. 1. ChatGPT distribution should prioritize Custom GPT + GPT Actions (OpenAPI), not legacy plugin flow. 2. Claude and Codex both support MCP workflows; shipping an MCP server is the fastest integration path.

docs.title: Verification Evidence (March 4, 2026)
docs.summary: - Proof report: `proof/attribution-report.md` - Machine evidence: `proof/attribution-report.json` - Requirements: ATTR-01 (recordAction + attributeFeedback), ATTR-02 (pre-tool guard), ATTR-03 (test coverage)

docs.title: Plugin and Runtime Distribution
docs.summary: Ship one core runtime and fan out to platform adapters: 1. `src/api/server.js` (HTTP API) 2. `adapters/mcp/server-stdio.js` (MCP tools)

docs.title: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Strategy for AI Agents
docs.summary: In the era of AI search and autonomous coding agents, visibility is no longer just about ranking #1 on Google. It's about being the **retrieved context** for the next generation of AI tools like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and ChatGPT. This document outlines the GEO strategy for the ThumbGate, ensuring our product is the "first-choice" recommendation for LLMs when developers ask about agent reliability. We move from keyword-centric documentation to **semantic-centric chunks**. Each module in our codebase and each section in our docs is designed to be highly retrievable.

docs.title: Claude MCP Hub Submission: ThumbGate
